name: playbook
description: Semantic memory store for tool usage patterns, optimizations, and lessons learned. Backed by Redis with Amazon Titan Text embeddings for similarity search.

tools.name: add_playbook_entry
tools.description: Add a playbook entry documenting a tool usage pattern, optimization, or lesson learned

tools.name: search_playbook
tools.description: Search the playbook for relevant entries using semantic similarity against Amazon Titan Text embeddings

tools.name: list_playbook_entries
tools.description: List all playbook entries, optionally filtered by tool name

tools.name: delete_playbook_entry
tools.description: Delete a playbook entry by its ID
